TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: CiyawAnang Icep Malecaday ku icep atu abing, u nu balidas amin ku pusadad a nipangangan. U canga atu nikasararaya i, makala tu tusaay a pulu ku raraya nu caang. I "Ma-lay" hanay a kitakit pangangan han "pinang" sa. I Pangcah a niyaru' ira "icep" u tapang tu sapakaen tu tu'as, tu lisin, tu sapawsa tu masamaanay a demak nu caay kaw kapawani nu Pangcah a sapatatudung. Ira ku sapalemed tu ma'uripay atu sapibuwahaw tu wawawawa sanay a lemed nu tamdaw. U icep dengay a kemkemen, anu i kasienawan diheku ku tireng anu mikemkem tu icep, anu parakat tu karireng caay ka tukatuk ku parakatay, ruma satu ira baru nu dipas i, dengay sasinabelen misasa' tu caledes, miserep aca tu tarakaw nu remes, u teluc u dungec nu icep i, malasinabel tu nu Pangcah, tangasa i matini araw aluman tu ku mabanaay, tina puwac nu icep. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ʦijawanaŋ iʦəp maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u iʦəp ato~u~u ab~b~viŋ, o~u~u no~u~u b~b~vaɾiɬ~ɮas amin ko~u~u po~u~usaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a nipaŋaŋan. o~u~u ʦaŋa ato~u~u nikasararaja i, makaɾa to~u~u to~u~usaaj a po~u~uɾo~u~u ko~u~u raraja no~u~u ʦaaŋ. i "ma-ɾaj" ħanaj a kitakit paŋaŋan ħan "pinaŋ" sa. i paŋʦaħ a nijaro~u~uʡ ira "iʦəp" o~u~u tapaŋ to~u~u sapakaən to~u~u to~u~uʡas, to~u~u ɾisin, to~u~u sapawsa to~u~u masamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦaaj kaw kapawani no~u~u paŋʦaħ a sapatato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ. ira ko~u~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u~u maʡo~u~uripaj ato~u~u sapib~b~vo~u~uwaħaw to~u~u wawawawa sanaj a ɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u~u iʦəp ɬ~ɮəŋaj a kəmkəmən, ano~u~u i kasiənawan ɬ~ɮiħəko~u~u ko~u~u tirəŋ ano~u~u mikəmkəm to~u~u iʦəp, ano~u~u parakat to~u~u karirəŋ ʦaaj ka to~u~ukato~u~uk ko~u~u parakataj, ro~u~uma sato~u~u ira b~b~varo~u~u no~u~u ɬ~ɮipas i, ɬ~ɮəŋaj sasinab~b~vəɾən misasaʡ to~u~u ʦaɾəɬ~ɮəs, misərəp aʦa to~u~u tarakaw no~u~u rəməs, o~u~u təɾo~u~uʦ o~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋəʦ no~u~u iʦəp i, maɾasinab~b~vəɾ to~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ, taŋasa i matini araw aɾo~u~uman to~u~u ko~u~u mab~b~vanaaj, tina po~u~uwaʦ no~u~u iʦəp. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
S.FORM: CiyawAnang Icep Malecaday ku icep atu abing, u nu balidas amin ku pusadad a nipangangan. U canga atu nikasararaya i, makala tu tusaay a pulu ku raraya nu caang. I "Ma-lay" hanay a kitakit pangangan han "pinang" sa. I Pangcah a niyaru' ira "icep" u tapang tu sapakaen tu tu'as, tu lisin, tu sapawsa tu masamaanay a demak nu caay kaw kapawani nu Pangcah a sapatatudung. Ira ku sapalemed tu ma'uripay atu sapibuwahaw tu wawawawa sanay a lemed nu tamdaw. U icep dengay a kemkemen, anu i kasienawan diheku ku tireng anu mikemkem tu icep, anu parakat tu karireng caay ka tukatuk ku parakatay, ruma satu ira baru nu dipas i, dengay sasinabelen misasa' tu caledes, miserep aca tu tarakaw nu remes, u teluc u dungec nu icep i, malasinabel tu nu Pangcah, tangasa i matini araw aluman tu ku mabanaay, tina puwac nu icep. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: ʦijawanaŋ iʦəp maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ko~u~u iʦəp ato~u~u ab~b~viŋ, o~u~u no~u~u b~b~vaɾiɬ~ɮas amin ko~u~u po~u~usaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ a nipaŋaŋan. o~u~u ʦaŋa ato~u~u nikasararaja i, makaɾa to~u~u to~u~usaaj a po~u~uɾo~u~u ko~u~u raraja no~u~u ʦaaŋ. i "ma-ɾaj" ħanaj a kitakit paŋaŋan ħan "pinaŋ" sa. i paŋʦaħ a nijaro~u~uʡ ira "iʦəp" o~u~u tapaŋ to~u~u sapakaən to~u~u to~u~uʡas, to~u~u ɾisin, to~u~u sapawsa to~u~u masamaanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ʦaaj kaw kapawani no~u~u paŋʦaħ a sapatato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ. ira ko~u~u sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u~u maʡo~u~uripaj ato~u~u sapib~b~vo~u~uwaħaw to~u~u wawawawa sanaj a ɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u~u iʦəp ɬ~ɮəŋaj a kəmkəmən, ano~u~u i kasiənawan ɬ~ɮiħəko~u~u ko~u~u tirəŋ ano~u~u mikəmkəm to~u~u iʦəp, ano~u~u parakat to~u~u karirəŋ ʦaaj ka to~u~ukato~u~uk ko~u~u parakataj, ro~u~uma sato~u~u ira b~b~varo~u~u no~u~u ɬ~ɮipas i, ɬ~ɮəŋaj sasinab~b~vəɾən misasaʡ to~u~u ʦaɾəɬ~ɮəs, misərəp aʦa to~u~u tarakaw no~u~u rəməs, o~u~u təɾo~u~uʦ o~u~u ɬ~ɮo~u~uŋəʦ no~u~u iʦəp i, maɾasinab~b~vəɾ to~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ, taŋasa i matini araw aɾo~u~uman to~u~u ko~u~u mab~b~vanaaj, tina po~u~uwaʦ no~u~u iʦəp. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
